reasoning: The Washington Commanders are 3-6 after Week 9 of the 2025 season. They have sustained multiple major injuries to key players, including QB Jayden Daniels (missed time with knee/hamstring issues), CB Marshon Lattimore (ACL tear, out for season), and RB Austin Ekeler (Achilles tear, out for season). Reflecting this poor form and devastated roster, their betting odds on FanDuel to win Super Bowl LX have plummeted to +100000 (1000-to-1), implying a probability of approximately 0.1%. With their playoff chances on life support and such long odds, the realistic chance of them winning the Super Bowl is essentially zero. I am setting the probability to the minimum allowable bound.
